ddls:
CREATE TABLE "livestock" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of livestock */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the type of livestock (e.g., Horses, pure-bred) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the livestock */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the section of agriculture */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the livestock */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Specific breed of the livestock */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the livestock in years */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the livestock (e.g., male, female) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the livestock is kept (e.g., farm name, region) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the record was updated */,
  "is_pure_bred" INTEGER /* Indicates if the livestock is pure-bred */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Current health status of the livestock (e.g., healthy, ill) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_livestock_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_livestock_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "average_weight" REAL /* Average weight of the livestock in the category */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the livestock in the category in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the section */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the section */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person for the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "livestock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the livestock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_livestock_id FOREIGN KEY ("livestock_id") REFERENCES livestock ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "livestock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the livestock being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was validated */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the validation result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_livestock_id FOREIGN KEY ("livestock_id") REFERENCES livestock ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_normalizations" (
  "normalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each normalization event */,
  "livestock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the livestock being normalized */,
  "normalization_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was normalized */,
  "normalization_result" TEXT /* Result of the normalization (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the normalization */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the normalization result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("normalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_normalizations_livestock_id FOREIGN KEY ("livestock_id") REFERENCES livestock ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_normalizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_cleansing" (
  "cleansing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cleansing event */,
  "livestock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the livestock being cleansed */,
  "cleansing_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was cleansed */,
  "cleansing_result" TEXT /* Result of the cleansing (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the cleansing */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the cleansing result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cleansing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_cleansing_livestock_id FOREIGN KEY ("livestock_id") REFERENCES livestock ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_cleansing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_transformations" (
  "transformation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transformation event */,
  "livestock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the livestock being transformed */,
  "transformation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was transformed */,
  "transformation_result" TEXT /* Result of the transformation (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the transformation */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the transformation result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transformation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_transformations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_transformations_livestock_id FOREIGN KEY ("livestock_id") REFERENCES livestock ("id")
)
